hero_sub: Speexify exists because the world doesn't need another language app. It needs somewhere to use the language you already have. Live sessions, one coach at a time, real conversations — every time.
hero_trusted: Members from 12+ countries practicing right now
vision_text: A world where a language stops being the wall and starts being the way through. Where the people with the ideas are also the people in the room with the words for them.
history_p1: We started Speexify because we kept noticing the same gap. People who'd studied English for ten years still froze in interviews. People who could read entire articles couldn't lead a meeting. People who scored well on tests still avoided phone calls. The language wasn't missing. The practice was.
history_p2: So we built somewhere to practice. Not another course. Not another app. A place where a coach picked for you meets you on a video call, and you spend the time using the language — not studying it. The shift comes faster than members expect. So does the confidence.
value1_desc: We don't teach you what to think. We give you somewhere to say what you already know — out loud, with a coach in the room.
value2_desc: Every session is a real conversation, not a drill. The reps build the confidence. The confidence shows up in the meeting.
value3_title: We've been in the room you're afraid of.
value3_desc: The hesitation. The translating. The freeze before you speak. Familiar. Survivable. Practiced through — with someone who's been there.
value4_desc: We don't track how many days in a row you logged in. We track the interview you landed. The call you stopped dreading. The promotion that followed.
life_p1: We work remotely across time zones. Coaches, engineers, designers, support — all pulled here by the same thing: the moment someone uses a language and finally sounds like themselves.
life_p2: It happens in every session. A pause shortens. A sentence finishes. Someone says the thing they've been rehearsing in their head for a week. That moment is why this exists.
timeline1_text: Started as a small group of coaches running live English sessions over video. No textbooks. No levels.
timeline2_text: Built scheduling for every time zone. Members started showing up from countries we hadn't planned for.
timeline3_text: Crossed a thousand members. Built tools so coaches could see what each member was actually working on.
timeline4_text: Made the practice plan adaptive. Every session now starts from where the last one ended.
leaders_subtitle: Three people who've been on both sides of the conversation.
testi1_quote: I used to mute myself on calls. Now I'm usually the one running them. The English was always there — I just had nowhere to actually use it.
testi2_quote: Two months here did more for me than ten years of studying. The difference is simple: I was actually speaking, every session.
testi3_quote: The interview I landed had three rounds. I'd practiced the second one out loud, twice, with my coach. It showed.
testi4_quote: I travel alone now and have actual conversations. The English used to be a wall. Now it's how I get around.
cta_title: We're hiring coaches who actually coach.
cta_text: If you've coached language with real adults — and you know the difference between teaching and practicing — we'd like to hear from you.
hero_image_alt: A member in a live session with a coach
offer_card1_text: The interview you've been rehearsing in your head. The meeting you mute yourself in. Practiced out loud — until they stop being scary.
offer_card2_text: Less translating in your head. More thinking in the language. The small confidence that compounds.
offer_card3_text: The dinner-table conversation in a new city. The taxi driver who asks where you're from. The version of you that travels lighter.
offer_card4_text: IELTS, TOEFL, university interviews. The speaking section that decides something — rehearsed with a coach who's sat through it.
digital_only_note: Everything happens online. Live coaching, live notes, live practice — no shipping, no classrooms.
